zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabeau de Brienne於1271年出生在法國德 艾斯特奧布布利恩勒-a奧時，她的父親Jean I de Brienne Count of Eu22歲，母親Beatrix de Chatillon17歲。她和Jean de Dampierre-Flandre II至少有3個女兒。她去世於1307年11月19日之前。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabeau de Brienne于1271年出生在法国德 艾斯特奧布布利恩勒-a奧时，她的父亲Jean I de Brienne Count of Eu22岁，母亲Beatrix de Chatillon17岁。她和Jean de Dampierre-Flandre II至少有3个女儿。她去世于1307年11月19日之前。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

en.lifeSummary: When Isabeau de Brienne was born in 1271, in Brienne-le-Château, Aube, Grand Est, France, her father, Jean I de Brienne Count of Eu, was 22 and her mother, Beatrix de Chatillon, was 17. She had at least 3 daughters with Jean de Dampierre-Flandre II. She died before 19 November 1307.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabeau de Brienne est née en 1271, à Brienne-le-Château, Aube, Grand Est, France, son père, Jean I de Brienne Count of Eu, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Beatrix de Chatillon, avait 17 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 filles avec Jean de Dampierre-Flandre II. Elle est décédée avant 19 novembre 1307.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabeau de Brienne 1271 in Brienne-le-Château, Aube, Großer Osten, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Jean I de Brienne Count of Eu 22 und ihre Mutter Beatrix de Chatillon 17. Sie hatte mit Jean de Dampierre-Flandre II mindestens 3 Töchter. Sie starb vor 19. November 1307.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabeau de Brienne è nata il nel 1271 nel Brienne-le-Château, Aube, Grand Est, Francia, sua padre, Jean I de Brienne Count of Eu, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Beatrix de Chatillon, aveva 17 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figlie con Jean de Dampierre-Flandre II. Morì prima del 19 novembre 1307.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabeau de Brienneが1271年にフランスグランド エストアウベブリーネ-レ-チaテアウで生まれた時，父Jean I de Brienne Count of Euは22歳，母Beatrix de Chatillonは17歳であった。彼女はJean de Dampierre-Flandre IIとの間に少なくとも3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1307年11月19日以前に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabeau de Brienne(이)가 1271년 프랑스 그랜드 에스트 오브 브리니-레-cha테오에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Jean I de Brienne Count of Eu(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrix de Chatillon(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 Jean de Dampierre-Flandre II(와)과 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1307년 11월 19일 이전 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabeau de Brienne nasceu em 1271, em Brienne-le-Château, Aube, Grand Est, França, seu pai, Jean I de Brienne Count of Eu, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Beatrix de Chatillon, tinha 17 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhas com Jean de Dampierre-Flandre II. Ela faleceu antes 19 de novembro de 1307.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabeau de Brienne родилась в 1271 г. в местности бриенне-ле-чaто, ауб, гранд эст, Франция, её отцу по имени Jean I de Brienne Count of Eu было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Beatrix de Chatillon, 17. У неё было по крайней мере 3 дочери от Jean de Dampierre-Flandre II. Она умерла перед 19 ноябрь 1307 г.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabeau de Brienne nació en 1271, en Brienne-le-Château, Aube, Grand Est, Francia, su papá, Jean I de Brienne Count of Eu, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Beatrix de Chatillon, tenía 17 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijas con Jean de Dampierre-Flandre II. Murió antes de 19 de noviembre de 1307.
